context: Tests whether the agent documents environment variable setup, token scope requirements, curl/jq dependencies, URL encoding practices, and references the get_mr_comments.sh script.

checklist.name: Documents GITLAB_TOKEN or GITLAB_PAT
checklist.description: README or documentation mentions setting GITLAB_TOKEN or GITLAB_PAT environment variable

checklist.name: Specifies read_api scope
checklist.description: Documentation states that token needs read_api scope/permission

checklist.name: References get_mr_comments.sh
checklist.description: Uses or references .agents/skills/gitlab-api/scripts/get_mr_comments.sh in the solution

checklist.name: Mentions curl requirement
checklist.description: Documents that curl is needed as a dependency

checklist.name: Mentions jq requirement
checklist.description: Documents that jq is needed for JSON parsing

checklist.name: Shows URL encoding
checklist.description: Demonstrates or mentions URL encoding project paths (replacing / with %2F)

checklist.name: Token creation guidance
checklist.description: Explains how to create a GitLab token (User Settings → Access Tokens or similar)

checklist.name: Exit code documentation
checklist.description: Documents script exit codes (0 for success, 1 for errors)
